_doc: In-app purchase catalog — the single source of truth for every real-money product. Game code (engine/scripts/core/iap.gd) reads product_id/usd/type by KEY; grove_data.gd carries the grant amounts and references these keys. The remaining fields are the App Store Connect setup values you copy when creating each In-App Purchase: reference_name (internal), display_name (player-facing, <=30 chars), description (player-facing, <=45 chars). Create each IAP in ASC with the SAME product_id and type; set a price point ~ the usd shown. product_id is permanent once created.

piggybank.description: Claim all the Acorns saved in your jar.

starter.description: 400 Acorns plus 60 Water to get growing.

gems_tier1.description: A handful of Acorns for more merging.

gems_tier2.description: A pouch of Acorns to grow your grove.

gems_tier3.description: A big bag of Acorns for lots of merging.

gems_tier4.description: A sack of Acorns for serious decorating.

gems_tier5.description: A crate of Acorns. Our best-value bundle.

gems_tier6.description: A mountain of Acorns. Our very best deal.
